nodes.label: Tests for consolidated_tools.py — priority incidents, knowledge-specific, and SL
Test enhanced get_priority_incidents with date filtering.
De-dup helper picks highest-priority workflow_state per number.
v4.0 fix: routes via sys_id={sys_id}, not the broken number={sys_id}.
Token-budget invariant: 'critical' returns 7-field curated view, not full row.
Every preset listed in SLA_STATUS_VALUES must be dispatchable.
